content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves moderately to the right ahead with the car well-centered on the track, following the dashed center line.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 52, target = 52 + 5 = 57
- Waypoint 57: (4.2557, 3.1701)
- Car position: (4.9773, 2.7830)
- Bearing = atan2(3.1701 - 2.7830, 4.2557 - 4.9773) = atan2(0.3871, -0.7216)
- = 180 - atan2(0.3871, 0.7216) = 180 - 28.22° = 151.78°
- Current heading: 156.49°
- Delta = 151.78 - 156.49 = -4.71° → very slight right correction

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to waypoint 57 is -4.71° which is just under 5°, car is nearly on the waypoint line so applying 0 steering to avoid oscillation.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due west) along y≈2.77",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-58, delta typically -5 to -15°",
    "Car is consistently near center — good positioning maintained",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — staying near center is optimal here",
    "Heading is ~156° (west-southwest), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -5° in this section — use 0 steering to avoid overshoot",
    "Previous -10 steering at delta -12.5° was appropriate; now delta is near 0",
    "Waypoints 52-58 show gradual right curve continuing, minimal correction needed"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.1078, 5.0397, 4.977],
    "y": [2.6889, 2.7283, 2.783],
    "yaw": [166.911, 163.103, 156.493]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -4.71,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
